name: ttrpg
description: Solo tabletop RPG toolkit on autonomous local game domains (R): pc (player-character sheets — new, fill, reorganize, log-session, show, companion), campaign (GM prep — synopsis, fronts/clocks, NPCs, factions, session prep; ex-obs:rpg), solo-mc (live play under Claude Code — play, scene, oracle, roll, setup, journal-pdf) with its narrateur and oracle agents, plus lore-extract and rules-keeper (canon/mj ventilation from raw sources). Extracted from obs across two rounds (0.26.0, then 0.28.0 for lore-extract/rules-keeper); obs remains upstream on the same game domain via extract-pdf (raw sources) and research (reports).
